title: Distinct Subsequences
problem_statement: Count the number of distinct ways to form string t from string s by deleting characters without changing order.

examples.explanation: Three subsequences of s match t.

intuition: Use DP over prefixes of s and t and count matching subsequences incrementally.

approaches.name: 2D DP on prefix lengths
approaches.description: dp[i][j] counts the ways to form t[0..j-1] from s[0..i-1], updating by matching or skipping characters.
approaches.why_not: A naive recursive solution is too slow due to repeated subproblems.

interview_qa.q: What does dp[j] represent when using 1D optimization?
interview_qa.a: The number of ways to match the first j characters of t using the processed prefix of s.
To avoid overwriting dp values needed for the current row when using a single array.
